text: Hey! Had a great time last night 😊
Hey! Yeah it was really fun. Thanks for organizing.
We should definitely hit up that arcade bar next time.
How's work going? Surviving the Monday?
Gotcha. I'm drowning in emails over here 😅. Let me know if you want to grab a quick coffee later this week!
Hey, any plans for the weekend yet?
Not yet, might just lay low.
Fair enough! If you feel like getting out, I'm thinking of checking out that new movie.
